name: jarvis-electron
description: Casca desktop do JARVIS — Web App + Agente Local numa janela nativa, com bandeja e splash. Ver ../docs/SEGURANCA-AGENTE-LOCAL.md e ../agente-local/README.md.

scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare-webapp && npm run rebuild-agente-local && electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js
